allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -Unique OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "3000 to'xtatildi")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://get.enterprisedb.com/postgresql/postgresql-16.4-1-windows-x64-binaries.zip' -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; $len = [math]::Round\($r.Headers['Content-Length']/1MB,1\); Write-Output "OK status=$\($r.StatusCode\) size=${len}MB" } catch { Write-Output "XATO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($base = 'C:\\Users\\Asadbek\\.aviora-pg'; if \(-not \(Test-Path $base\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $base | Out-Null }; $zip = Join-Path $base 'pg.zip'; if \(Test-Path $zip\) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }; Write-Output "Yuklab olish boshlandi -> $zip"; & curl.exe -L -s -o $zip 'https://get.enterprisedb.com/postgresql/postgresql-16.4-1-windows-x64-binaries.zip'; if \(Test-Path $zip\) { $mb = [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $zip\).Length/1MB,1\); Write-Output "Tugadi: ${mb}MB" } else { Write-Output 'Yuklab olinmadi' })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Asadbek\\.aviora-pg\\pg.zip'\) { $mb=[math]::Round\(\(Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\Asadbek\\.aviora-pg\\pg.zip'\).Length/1MB,1\); Write-Output "Joriy: ${mb} / 323 MB" } else { Write-Output 'hali boshlanmadi' })

PowerShell($base = 'C:\\Users\\Asadbek\\.aviora-pg'; $zip = Join-Path $base 'pg.zip'; Write-Output \("Zip: " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $zip\).Length/1MB,1\) + " MB"\); if \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $base 'pgsql'\)\) { Remove-Item \(Join-Path $base 'pgsql'\) -Recurse -Force }; Write-Output "Arxiv ochilmoqda..."; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $base -Force; if \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $base 'pgsql\\bin\\postgres.exe'\)\) { Write-Output "OK: pgsql\\bin tayyor"; & \(Join-Path $base 'pgsql\\bin\\postgres.exe'\) --version } else { Write-Output "XATO: postgres.exe topilmadi" })

PowerShell($bin='C:\\Users\\Asadbek\\.aviora-pg\\pgsql\\bin'; Write-Output '== bazalar =='; & \(Join-Path $bin 'psql.exe'\) -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -tAc "SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname='aviora'" 2>&1; $env:PGPASSWORD=$null; Write-Output '== aviora yaratish \(agar yo`q bo`lsa\) =='; & \(Join-Path $bin 'createdb.exe'\) -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres aviora 2>&1; Write-Output \("createdb exit=" + $LASTEXITCODE\))

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"fullName":"Asadbek Superadmin","password":"Aviora2026!"}' -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output \("LOGIN OK -> " + $r.user.fullName + " | role=" + $r.user.role + " | token=" + $r.accessToken.Substring\(0,20\) + "..."\) } catch { Write-Output \("XATO: " + $_.Exception.Message\); if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/@hello-pangea/dnd/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('react peer:', p.peerDependencies && p.peerDependencies.react\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output 'restarting'")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"fullName":"Asadbek Superadmin","password":"Aviora2026!"}' -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("LOGIN OK -> " + $r.user.fullName\) } catch { Write-Output \("LOGIN XATO: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
